name: Torex Gold Resources Inc.
description: Torex Gold Resources Inc. is a Canadian intermediate gold producer focused on its 29,000-hectare Morelos Gold Property in the Guerrero Gold Belt of southwest Mexico. The company operates the El Limón Guajes mine complex and has advanced the Media Luna underground project as a significant production expansion. Torex is a growth-oriented producer with substantial exploration upside across its large contiguous land package.
